GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used to route queries to appropriate subagents for detailed analysis. Choose it when the user needs specialized assistance beyond the core topics.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query requires specialized assistance, identify the appropriate subagent.
Route the query to the subagent for further analysis.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only route queries to the correct specialist subagent based on the user's needs. You aren't able to directly handle scoring, financial projections, or competitive analysis.
